title: CoD Zombies Sound Pack
description: Replaces Zombie Audio with Black Ops 2 Audio
body:
Tested and Working on Versions 1.12.2 - 1.21.4 (Let me know if it works on even older versions)

Replaces boring zombie sounds with all zombie sounds from Black Ops 2

41 Ambient Sounds

14 Pain Sounds

11 Death Sounds

For visual zombie enhancement I recommend using Blue's Better Zombies or Tissou's Zombie Pack

Thanks for downloading and enjoy!
